text.title: Google Search Ads Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real google-search-ads engagements. Each pairs a symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Ad group mixes 'best CRM' + 'free CRM' + 'CRM pricing'; QS averages 4.
antipattern.root-cause: Author lumped keywords by topic, not intent.

antipattern.symptom: Broad match keywords on manual CPC; spend triples; CPA explodes.
antipattern.root-cause: Broad without smart bidding misses guardrails.
antipattern.fix: Broad MUST pair with smart bidding (target-CPA / target-ROAS / max-conv).

antipattern.symptom: Single RSA per ad group; QS plateau; no creative learning.
antipattern.root-cause: Author shipped 1 RSA to launch fast.
antipattern.fix: Ship ≥3 RSAs with diversified headlines; rotate every 30 days.
